cards.name: ⅩⅨ The Sun, reversed
cards.interpretation: blocked happiness, excessive enthusiasm, pessimism, unrealistic expectations, conceitedness

cards.name: 10 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: unhappy home, separation, domestic conflict, disharmony, isolation

cards.name: 6 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: failure, lack of recognition, no rewards, lack of achievement
